Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. An Unsolicited Guide to Being a Researcher [pdf] 59 upvotes, 6 comments
  2. Can you get root with only a cigarette lighter? (2024) 135 upvotes, 20 comments
  3. POSSE – Publish on your Own Site, Syndicate Elsewhere 318 upvotes, 70 comments
  4. Dataframe 1.0.0.0 89 upvotes, 16 comments
  5. The gold standard of optimization: A look under the hood of RollerCoaster Tycoon 488 upvotes, 134 comments
  6. Flash-MoE: Running a 397B Parameter Model on a Laptop 377 upvotes, 119 comments
  7. America tells private firms to "hack back" 9 upvotes, 0 comments
  8. Project Nomad – Knowledge That Never Goes Offline 529 upvotes, 192 comments
  9. The way CTRL-C in Postgres CLI cancels queries is incredibly hack-y 106 upvotes, 33 comments
  10. Nanopositioning Metrology, Gödel, and Bootstraps 8 upvotes, 0 comments
  11. The LCA problem revisited [pdf] 32 upvotes, 7 comments
  12. PC Gamer recommends RSS readers in a 37mb article that just keeps downloading 745 upvotes, 341 comments
  13. Bombadil: Property-based testing for web UIs by Antithesis 132 upvotes, 58 comments
  14. GitHub appears to be struggling with measly three nines availability 282 upvotes, 149 comments
  15. The future of version control 596 upvotes, 337 comments
  16. iPhone 17 Pro Demonstrated Running a 400B LLM 65 upvotes, 27 comments
  17. Study: 'Security Fatigue' May Weaken Digital Defenses 33 upvotes, 12 comments
  18. Why I love NixOS 390 upvotes, 268 comments
  19. Fear and Fragility: The Glass Delusion and Its History 10 upvotes, 2 comments
  20. Reports of code's death are greatly exaggerated 507 upvotes, 364 comments
  21. Walmart: ChatGPT checkout converted 3x worse than website 241 upvotes, 176 comments
  22. Show HN: The King Wen Permutation: [52, 10, 2] 42 upvotes, 23 comments
  23. Migrating to the EU 570 upvotes, 477 comments
  24. If Dspy is so great, why isn't anyone using it? 69 upvotes, 46 comments
  25. Tin Can, a 'landline' for kids 241 upvotes, 208 comments
  26. Attractive students no longer receive better results as classes moved online 301 upvotes, 292 comments
  27. You are not your job 303 upvotes, 328 comments
  28. Cyber.mil serving file downloads using TLS certificate which expired 3 days ago 24 upvotes, 26 comments
  29. What young workers are doing to AI-proof themselves 195 upvotes, 309 comments
  30. GoGoGrandparent (YC S16) is hiring Back end Engineers 0 upvotes, 0 comments

Last generated 12:00am, 24 March 2026. Source here.
